testcase.name: Coordinates Module > parseCoordinatesCsv > should parse CSV with header row
Coordinates Module > parseCoordinatesCsv > should parse CSV without header row
Coordinates Module > parseCoordinatesCsv > should handle ITM coordinates (large numbers)
Coordinates Module > parseCoordinatesCsv > should handle empty lines and whitespace
Coordinates Module > parseCoordinatesCsv > should handle quoted values in CSV
Coordinates Module > parseCoordinatesCsv > should skip invalid rows
Coordinates Module > parseCoordinatesCsv > should return empty map for empty input
Coordinates Module > calculateCoordinateBounds > should calculate correct bounds for ITM coordinates
Coordinates Module > calculateCoordinateBounds > should handle single coordinate
Coordinates Module > surveyToCanvas > should transform ITM coordinates to canvas coordinates
Coordinates Module > surveyToCanvas > should maintain aspect ratio
Coordinates Module > surveyToCanvas > should handle very small coordinate differences
Coordinates Module > surveyToCanvas > should handle identical coordinates (single point)
Coordinates Module > applyCoordinatesToNodes > should apply ITM coordinates to matching nodes
testcase.system-out: === COORDINATE APPLICATION DEBUG === Found 3 nodes with matching coordinates Matched coordinate bounds: { minX: 182000, maxX: 183000, minY: 654000, maxY: 655000 } Survey extent (meters): { width: 1000, height: 1000 } Canvas dimensions (pixels): { width: 800, height: 600 } Using scale: 100.00 pixels/meter (auto calculated) Sample matched coordinates: Node 1: ITM(182000.00, 654000.00) Node 2: ITM(183000.00, 655000.00) Node 3: ITM(182500.00, 654500.00) Transform node 1: ITM(182000.00, 654000.00) -> Canvas(-49600.00, 50300.00) Transform node 2: ITM(183000.00, 655000.00) -> Canvas(50400.00, -49700.00) Transform node 3: ITM(182500.00, 654500.00) -> Canvas(400.00, 300.00) Canvas position spread: { xMin: '-49600.00', xMax: '50400.00', xRange: '100000.00', yMin: '-49700.00', yMax: '50300.00', yRange: '100000.00' } Applied coordinates: 3 matched, 0 unmatched === END COORDINATE DEBUG ===

testcase.name: Coordinates Module > applyCoordinatesToNodes > should handle partial coordinate matches

testcase.name: Coordinates Module > applyCoordinatesToNodes > should handle empty coordinate map
Coordinates Module > applyCoordinatesToNodes > should handle real-world ITM coordinate spread
testcase.system-out: === COORDINATE APPLICATION DEBUG === Found 20 nodes with matching coordinates Matched coordinate bounds: { minX: 182000, maxX: 182200, minY: 654000, maxY: 654200 } Survey extent (meters): { width: 200, height: 200 } Canvas dimensions (pixels): { width: 800, height: 600 } Using scale: 2.00 pixels/meter (user specified) Sample matched coordinates: Node 1: ITM(182050.00, 654000.00) Node 2: ITM(182100.00, 654000.00) Node 3: ITM(182150.00, 654000.00) Node 4: ITM(182200.00, 654000.00) Node 5: ITM(182000.00, 654050.00) Transform node 1: ITM(182050.00, 654000.00) -> Canvas(300.00, 500.00) Transform node 2: ITM(182100.00, 654000.00) -> Canvas(400.00, 500.00) Transform node 3: ITM(182150.00, 654000.00) -> Canvas(500.00, 500.00) Canvas position spread: { xMin: '200.00', xMax: '600.00', xRange: '400.00', yMin: '100.00', yMax: '500.00', yRange: '400.00' } Applied coordinates: 20 matched, 0 unmatched === END COORDINATE DEBUG ===

testcase.name: ITM Coordinate System > ITM to WGS84 Conversion > should convert central Israel ITM coordinates to WGS84 correctly
ITM Coordinate System > ITM to WGS84 Conversion > should convert Jerusalem ITM coordinates to WGS84 correctly
ITM Coordinate System > ITM to WGS84 Conversion > should handle roundtrip conversion with minimal error
ITM Coordinate System > ITM to WGS84 Conversion > should convert reference point correctly
ITM Coordinate System > WGS84 to ITM Conversion > should convert Tel Aviv WGS84 to ITM correctly
ITM Coordinate System > WGS84 to ITM Conversion > should handle edge cases near Israel borders
Tile Coordinate System > WGS84 to Tile Conversion > should convert Tel Aviv coordinates to correct tiles at zoom 17
Tile Coordinate System > WGS84 to Tile Conversion > should convert tiles back to WGS84 correctly
Tile Coordinate System > Zoom Level Calculation > should select appropriate zoom for 3 pixels/meter scale
Tile Coordinate System > Zoom Level Calculation > should select higher zoom for detailed view
Tile Coordinate System > Zoom Level Calculation > should select lower zoom for overview
ITM to Tile Coordinate Alignment > should correctly align ITM coordinates with map tiles
ITM to Tile Coordinate Alignment > should maintain spatial relationships when converting multiple points
Canvas Coordinate Transformation > Survey to Canvas Conversion > should place points correctly relative to canvas center
Canvas Coordinate Transformation > Survey to Canvas Conversion > should maintain correct scale with pixels per meter
Canvas Coordinate Transformation > Survey to Canvas Conversion > should flip Y axis correctly (north = up in ITM, down in canvas)
Canvas Coordinate Transformation > View Bounds Calculation > should calculate ITM bounds from canvas view correctly
Canvas Coordinate Transformation > View Bounds Calculation > should account for view scale (zoom)
Integration: ITM Nodes to Map Tiles > should correctly position nodes with ITM coordinates on map
testcase.system-out: === COORDINATE APPLICATION DEBUG === Found 3 nodes with matching coordinates Matched coordinate bounds: { minX: 200000, maxX: 200010, minY: 649990, maxY: 650000 } Survey extent (meters): { width: 10, height: 10 } Canvas dimensions (pixels): { width: 800, height: 600 } Using scale: 100.00 pixels/meter (auto calculated) Sample matched coordinates: Node 1: ITM(200000.00, 650000.00) Node 2: ITM(200010.00, 650000.00) Node 3: ITM(200005.00, 649990.00) Transform node 1: ITM(200000.00, 650000.00) -> Canvas(-100.00, -200.00) Transform node 2: ITM(200010.00, 650000.00) -> Canvas(900.00, -200.00) Transform node 3: ITM(200005.00, 649990.00) -> Canvas(400.00, 800.00) Canvas position spread: { xMin: '-100.00', xMax: '900.00', xRange: '1000.00', yMin: '-200.00', yMax: '800.00', yRange: '1000.00' } Applied coordinates: 3 matched, 0 unmatched === END COORDINATE DEBUG ===

testcase.name: Integration: ITM Nodes to Map Tiles > should handle real-world ITM coordinate ranges

Map Layer Integration > Map Layer Alignment Verification > should handle coordinate scale correctly

Map Layer Integration > Error Handling and Edge Cases > should handle very close coordinates (sub-meter precision)

Map Tile Visibility Tests > Zoomed Out Scenarios > should not hit tile limit for normal zoomed-out views
Map Tile Visibility Tests > Zoomed Out Scenarios > should select appropriate zoom level when zoomed out
Map Tile Visibility Tests > Zoomed Out Scenarios > should handle panning to the right when zoomed out
Map Tile Visibility Tests > Zoomed Out Scenarios > should maintain tile coverage across entire visible area
Map Tile Visibility Tests > Zoomed Out Scenarios > should handle extreme zoom out without errors

Map Tile Visibility Tests > World Coordinate System > should handle negative coordinate offsets

API Contract: Schema Constants > VALID_ROLES > should have exactly 3 roles

API Contract: Features Endpoint > PUT /api/features - Request Schema > should accept valid features update

API Contract: Response Schemas > should document error response structure
API Contract: Response Schemas > should document list response structure

tests/e2e/auth.spec.ts
testcase.system-out: [dotenv@17.2.3] injecting env (1) from .env.local -- tip: 👥 sync secrets across teammates & machines: https://dotenvx.com/ops

failure.message: Playwright Test did not expect test.describe() to be called here. Most common reasons include: - You are calling test.describe() in a configuration file. - You are calling test.describe() in a file that is imported by the configuration file. - You have two different versions of @playwright/test. This usually happens when one of the dependencies in your package.json depends on @playwright/test.

testcase.failure: Error: Playwright Test did not expect test.describe() to be called here. Most common reasons include: - You are calling test.describe() in a configuration file. - You are calling test.describe() in a file that is imported by the configuration file. - You have two different versions of @playwright/test. testcase.name: sanitizeErrorMessage > should return default message for null/undefined error in production
sanitizeErrorMessage > should return custom default message when provided
sanitizeErrorMessage > should return error message in development
sanitizeErrorMessage > should handle string errors in development
parseBody > should reject body exceeding max size based on Content-Length
parseBody > should handle request with json() method
parseBody > should handle request with body property
parseBody > should handle streaming request body
parseBody > should handle empty streaming body
parseBody > should reject streaming body exceeding max size
validateString > should return null for null input
validateString > should return null for undefined input
validateString > should return null for non-string input
validateString > should return the string for valid input
validateString > should truncate strings exceeding max length
validateString > should use default max length of 1000
validateRole > should accept all valid roles
validateRole > should reject invalid roles
validateFeatureKey > should accept all valid feature keys
validateFeatureKey > should reject invalid feature keys
validateUUID > should accept valid v4 UUIDs
validateUUID > should accept UUIDs in uppercase
validateUUID > should reject invalid formats
validateSketchInput - edge cases > should accept empty name string
validateSketchInput - edge cases > should accept null name
validateSketchInput - edge cases > should reject name exceeding 200 characters
validateSketchInput - edge cases > should accept edges array
validateSketchInput - edge cases > should reject edges exceeding maximum
validateSketchInput - edge cases > should validate adminConfig is an object
validateSketchInput - edge cases > should accept valid creationDate string
validateSketchInput - edge cases > should reject non-string creationDate
validateUserUpdateInput > should accept valid role update
validateUserUpdateInput > should reject invalid role
validateUserUpdateInput > should reject non-string role
validateUserUpdateInput > should accept valid organizationId
validateUserUpdateInput > should accept null organizationId
validateUserUpdateInput > should reject invalid organizationId format
validateUserUpdateInput > should reject non-string organizationId
validateOrganizationInput > should accept valid organization name
validateOrganizationInput > should require name
validateOrganizationInput > should reject null name
validateOrganizationInput > should reject non-string name
validateOrganizationInput > should reject empty name
validateOrganizationInput > should reject name exceeding 200 characters
validateFeaturesInput > should accept valid features object
validateFeaturesInput > should require features object
validateFeaturesInput > should reject array as features
validateFeaturesInput > should reject invalid feature key
validateFeaturesInput > should reject non-boolean feature value
validateFeaturesInput > should collect multiple errors
